title: Magic: The Gathering reveals its ambitious roadmap for 2027 with collaborations from Stardew Valley and The Hobbit
summary: Wizards of the Coast announces next year's sets, including a crossover with the popular farm simulation game and an expansion based on Tolkien's work.

title: Call of Duty movie sets its theatrical release for 2028
summary: The film adaptation of the iconic first-person shooter video game saga confirms a release window and new production details.

title: Disco Elysium studio ZA/UM faces new wave of mass layoffs
summary: The developer behind the acclaimed RPG and the recent Zero Parades announces the cutting of a large part of its staff amid ongoing controversies.

title: Marathon director leaves Bungie at the worst possible time for the project
summary: Joe Ziegler leaves the studio just one month after the mass layoffs, plunging the future of the new shooter into uncertainty.

title: Jennifer English, Baldur's Gate 3 star, withdraws from a new video game due to health issues
summary: The actress, who also voiced Clair Obscur: Expedition 33, leaves upcoming projects to prioritize her well-being.

title: Wuthering Waves announces official animated series alongside the creation of Kuro Onroad studio
summary: The popular open-world action role-playing game will expand its narrative universe with an anime adaptation produced by its own developer.

title: Valve warns that the RAM price crisis has no end and will continue to worsen
summary: The company points out that retail memory prices are lagging behind and the upward trend shows no signs of improvement for consumers.

title: Nintendo Switch 2 dominates the news with new sales, analysis, patents, and game previews
summary: Nintendo's new console makes headlines with sales data in Japan, first impressions of Lies of P, the patent for its dock, and a review of Gecko Gods.

title: Bethesda and Obsidian chart the future of their flagship franchises: Starfield and Fallout
summary: New details and speculation surround Starfield's roadmap after its latest announcement, as well as the possible development of Fallout 5 and a hypothetical New Vegas 2.

title: Xbox's strategy for single-player games sparks controversy after new internal layoffs
summary: Xbox content director Matt Booty defends the company's new direction, while it is revealed that the layoffs affected the creators of the most influential game of the decade.

title: Rebel Wolves and Bandai Namco confirm key details and physical release of The Blood of Dawnwalker
summary: The promising open-world vampire RPG confirms its physical edition and opens the debate on player agency in non-linear stories.

title: The phenomenon of Christopher Nolan's 'The Odyssey' dominates film and gaming news
summary: Multiple reports and lists analyze the release of the new mythological blockbuster, from its streaming platforms to its cultural impact on video games.

title: God of War series on Amazon Prime Video forced to recast Kratos due to an on-set injury
summary: The highly anticipated adaptation of the popular video game suffers a setback in production that forces a recasting of the iconic protagonist.

title: Rumors of a new Zelda remake keep Nintendo fans on edge
summary: The community intensely speculates on which upcoming title in the saga will be reimagined by Nintendo, pending an official announcement.

title: GameStop surprises markets by acquiring nearly 10% of eBay in an unprecedented hostile takeover bid
summary: The video game retail chain launches a hostile takeover bid for the popular online auction platform, baffling analysts.

title: Naruto live-action shares new production details that both excite and worry fans
summary: The live-action adaptation of the famous ninja manga and anime reveals information about its development, sparking debate among fans about its faithfulness.

title: Valve promises progress on the long-awaited Mann vs Machine update for Team Fortress 2
summary: The company addresses the Team Fortress 2 community to assure that the development of the big cooperative patch is still ongoing and has not been abandoned.

title: IO Interactive details its canceled James Bond video game, 007 First Light, and its ensemble approach
summary: The studio behind Hitman reveals the ins and outs of the ambitious Bond saga project that never came to fruition, explaining its innovative narrative proposal.

title: Dungeons & Dragons resurrects one of the most powerful Dark Lords of Ravenloft in its new supplement
summary: The quintessential role-playing game brings back an iconic villain who literally broke the game universe, expanding the narrative of the terrifying campaign setting.

title: Sony confirms regional prices for PlayStation Store in Latin America, but Mexican players show their discontent
summary: The Japanese company formalizes the new prices in the region, although the Mexican gaming community expresses its disappointment with the final figures applied to games.
